Legal

Policies

01

General

This website is operated by Pattaya Soi 6 Bar (Nikki Bar · Lollipop · PG Bar). Customers make voluntary payments directly to the individual seller.

02

Staff Gratuity

The seller fulfills orders at the venue on behalf of the customer. No physical goods are shipped.

03

Fulfillment

A confirmation and thank-you message will be delivered within 24 hours of a successful payment. Orders are fulfilled in person at the venue only.

04

Refunds

All purchases are final and non-refundable. Refunds are issued only for duplicate charges or clear processing errors. Contact: thannalin22040@gmail.com

05

Terms of Use

Orders are subject to availability at the venue and have no cash value.

06

Privacy

Card payments are processed securely by Stripe. We do not sell or share personal data. Removal requests: thannalin22040@gmail.com

07

Compliance

All services comply with venue policies and applicable Thai law. No adult content is sold through this website.
